---
title: "Amplicons metadata wrangling"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
---

# this is metadata wrangling for filtering contigs by best hit for treebuilding
input files are all manual BLAST results + list of samples/taxa/names as identified in the NHM gardens and in the student workshop
#setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Biostrings)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(taxonomizr)
library(ggplot2)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
BLAST_data<-
  list.files(path = "../../../DK_amplicon_blasting/DK_manual_results_clean",
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
) %>%
  lapply(function(f)
    read_csv(
      f,
      col_names = TRUE,
      col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
    )) %>%
  bind_rows %>%
  type.convert(as.is = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::rename(dataset = plate) %>% 
  mutate(
  final_group = coalesce(
    case_when(hit1_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ as.character(max_readcount_group)),
    case_when(hit2_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ as.character(hit2_group)),
    as.character(max_readcount_group)),
  final_readcount = coalesce(
    case_when(hit1_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ as.numeric(max_readcount)),
    case_when(hit2_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ as.numeric(hit2_readcount)),
    as.numeric(max_readcount)),
  final_primer_set = coalesce(
    case_when(hit1_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ hit1_primer_set),
    case_when(hit2_expect %in% c("Y", "y") ~ hit2_primer_set)),
    adapter_name = paste0("SP27_", str_pad(SP27, 3, pad = "0"),
                          "_SP5_",str_pad(SP5, 3, pad = "0")),
  dataset = gsub("BW_", "BWplate", dataset),
  dataset = gsub("day_", "day", dataset),
  dataset = gsub("Lakes_", "day", dataset),
  dataset = gsub("Garden_", "BWplate", dataset),
  sample = paste0(adapter_name, "_", dataset),
  barcode = if_else(barcode == "CO1", "COI", barcode),
  name = gsub("cf. ", "", sample),
  name = gsub("aff. ", "", sample),
  name = gsub(" ", "_", sample),
  fasta_headers = paste0(sample, "_pass_group", final_group, "_readcount_", final_readcount)) %>% 
  filter(final_expect == "Y") %>% 
  select(dataset, sample, fasta_headers, barcode)

ID_names <- read_csv("../../../DK_amplicon_blasting/all_DK_BW_sample_names.csv") %>% 
  dplyr::rename(dataset = plate, name = new_code) %>%
  mutate(
    dataset = gsub("BW_", "BWplate", dataset),
    dataset = gsub("day_", "day", dataset),
    dataset = gsub("Lakes_", "day", dataset),
    dataset = gsub("Garden_", "BWplate", dataset),
    sample = paste0(sample, "_", dataset),
    barcode = if_else(barcode == "CO1", "COI", barcode),
    name = gsub("cf. ", "", name),
    name = gsub("aff. ", "", name),
    name = gsub(" ", "_", name)) %>% 
  distinct(sample, barcode, name, expected_taxon)

named_BLAST_results<-left_join(BLAST_data ,ID_names, by = c("sample", "barcode"), keep = T) %>% 
 drop_na() %>% 
  select(sample.x, barcode.x, fasta_headers, expected_taxon, name) %>% 
  dplyr::rename(sample = sample.x,
                barcode = barcode.x) #%>% 
  #write_csv("../../../DK_amplicon_blasting/new_names_samples_for_treenames.csv")
```


```{r versioning}
sessionInfo()
```
